name: whytcard-cortex
description: A reasoning pipeline as reflex hooks for Claude Code. At the boundaries of the agent cycle, Cortex asks the right question instead of dictating an answer, to make the agent reason, research and use the tools at hand for itself rather than piling instructions on it. It also learns your durable preferences -- by consent -- into a living, steerable, lockable guide it follows in your language. Questions, not orders.
